title: Capable Cauldrons
body:
__Active Development__: Minecraft 1.20.1

__Website: [Team CoFH](https://teamcofh.com)__

__Discord: [Team CoFH Discord](https://discordapp.com/invite/uRKrnbH)__

---

This is a very simple mod - it enables Forge capabilities for the Cauldron Block, which allows all sorts of various mods to interact with it the same way that they would interact with each other.

For example, Fluiducts from [Thermal Dynamics](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-dynamics) can be used to insert and extract fluid, as shown below. You'll notice that pistons are still able to move Cauldrons, so there is absolutely no change to vanilla behavior. The first Cauldron is filled with a Dispenser, which is another interaction added by this mod.


![Cauldron Example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CoFH/Version/main/capable_cauldrons/capable_cauldrons.gif)


This mod has no dependencies but does use mixins! Happy Cauldroning. :)
